title: Bridge Essay: Integrating the Physical Environment Within a Population Neuroscience Perspectiv

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — nature connectedness, biophilia, environmental neuroscience.

**Integrating the Physical Environment Within a Population Neuroscience Perspective.**. Curr Top Behav Neurosci.. PMID: 38691314. DOI: 10.1007/7854_2024_477. Population neuroscience recognises the role of the environment in shaping brain, behaviour, and mental health. An overview of current evidence from neuroscientific and epidemiological studies highlights the protective effects of nature on cognitive function and stress reduction, the detrimental effects of urban living on mental health, and emerging concerns relating to extreme weather events and eco-anxiety.
